---
title: A Systematic Methodology for Characterizing Scalability of DNN Accelerators
  using SCALE-Sim
author:
- Anand Samajdar
- J. Joseph
- Yuhao Zhu
- Paul Whatmough
- Matt Mattina
- Tushar Krishna
categories:
- Show All
- Work (Co-)Led by Horizon Lab
topics:
- mlsys
url_source: https://horizon-lab.org/pubs/ispass20.pdf
code_source: https://github.com/ARM-software/SCALE-Sim
journ: ISPASS
year: 2020
contrib: Work (Co-)Led by Horizon Lab
image: featured.png
pub_number: 38
---
